summary: Iteration 16: Verified all backend changes for sync flow, NIR PDF parser, and barcode merge logic. 16/16 tests passed (100%). All requested features work correctly.

minor.issue: ProductResponse Pydantic model does not expose 'updated_at' field even though it's stored in DB. Frontend cannot see the updated_at for sync decisions without raw DB or a separate endpoint. Verified via direct Mongo check instead.

passed_tests: POST /api/sales -> product.updated_at is set in DB when stock decremented
POST /api/sync/apply-remote-sales with empty sales returns {applied:0, skipped:0}
POST /api/sync/apply-remote-sales decrements stock AND sets updated_at
POST /api/sync/apply-remote-sales skips duplicates by id (when no txn_id)
POST /api/sync/receive decrements stock AND sets updated_at on products
POST /api/sync/products/push does NOT overwrite stoc on existing products (only updates price/other fields)
POST /api/sync/products/push inserts stoc correctly on NEW products
POST /api/nir/parse-pdf returns 12 items from TOP_2026001074.pdf with PRET VANZARE (25.00, 60.00, 41.00 present among prices)
POST /api/nir/from-pdf accepts pret_vanzare; new product created with pret_vanzare (no *1.3 markup)
POST /api/nir/from-pdf on existing product: stock incremented + pret_vanzare updated + original name PRESERVED
POST /api/products/bulk-barcode MERGE: when barcode exists on another product, current product deleted, stock transferred, response includes merged count + merge_details
POST /api/products/bulk-barcode normal update when barcode unique returns updated=1, merged=0
action_items: Consider adding 'updated_at' to ProductResponse model if frontend needs it for sync status. Currently only in DB.
(Optional) ANAF/invoice field 'cui' used in test is not validated by backend; this is fine for sync flow but noted.
critical_code_review_comments: sync/products/push correctly removed 'stoc' from updatable fields - prevents race condition when both instances have concurrent sales. Good fix.
sync/sales-since does NOT require authentication (per design spec) - ensure SYNC_SECRET is protected on apply-remote-sales (confirmed).
bulk_update_barcodes merge logic preserves ORIGINAL product name when merging; stock is transferred via $inc - safe under concurrency.
create_nir_from_pdf now uses {'$set': {'pret_vanzare': ...}} on existing product instead of overwriting name - correct behavior for duplicates via barcode.
ProductResponse Pydantic model omits updated_at - consider adding it (Optional[str]) for API consistency with internal DB schema.
seed_data_creation: Created (and cleaned up) TEST_SYNC_PROD_*, TEST_MERGE_A/B_*, TEST_SUP_* ephemeral products/suppliers. Some TEST_SYNC_* sales inserted via sync endpoints remain in DB (safe, prefixed).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 16 verified: (1) product.updated_at set on stock decrement from POST /api/sales, POST /api/sync/receive, POST /api/sync/apply-remote-sales. (2) New endpoints /sync/sales-since (no auth) and /sync/apply-remote-sales (sync_secret). (3) /sync/products/push no longer touches stoc on existing products. (4) NIR parse-pdf returns 12 items with PRET VANZARE (not achizitie). (5) NIR from-pdf preserves existing product name + updates stock & pret_vanzare. (6) bulk-barcode merges duplicate products when barcode exists on another. Note: ProductResponse Pydantic model doesn't expose updated_at - tests verify via direct MongoDB read.

sales_updated_at.notes: Verified via raw DB read (model doesn't expose updated_at)

sync_apply_remote_sales.notes: Dedup by transaction_id and id; decrements stock + sets updated_at

sync_products_push_stoc_guard.notes: stoc NOT overwritten on existing products; stoc stored on NEW inserts

nir_parse_pdf_12_items.notes: Returns 12 items for TOP_2026001074.pdf with prices 25/60/41 etc from PRET VANZARE column

bulk_barcode_merge.notes: Response includes merged count + merge_details[] with stoc_transferat
